name: Patient Case
history: Past experiences of pressure related to performance and social interactions. Reports presenting a confident front and hiding vulnerability. A recent business failure led to financial hardship.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must succeed to be accepted and valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I fail, I will be rejected and alone.
coping_strategies: Presents a confident front and hides vulnerability.
situation: Invited to visit their sister while dealing with financial instability.
auto_thought: If I visit my sister, she will see me as a failure.
behavior: Avoids visiting sister to prevent perceived judgment.
